pages.raw_text:
The GLACIERS are not very numerous
in Spokane. However, there is a suf-
ficient number to take out a charter
from the American Federation of La
Dor, and it is understood that a dele
cation has been appointed to wait up
on Organizer Heskett. The matter
has not yet been drawn to Mr.. Hes
kett's attention.


An effort is also being made to
organize the freight handlers. Con-
siderable difficulty is obstructing
every attempt in this direction, as
it is stated that the railroad com
pany views with alarm any attempt
to unionize It's employees. Everything
appears to be in readiness now to
ask the American Federation of La
Dor for a charter. 7. S. Heskett ex-
poets the organization to be launch
ed in q very short time.
